title: Integrations

notInstalled.title: Connect your apps
notInstalled.body: Houston uses an integrations provider to let your agent use Gmail, Slack, Google Drive, and 100+ other services on your behalf. The default provider is Composio. One-time install, about 80 MB.

needsAuth.title: Connect your integrations provider
needsAuth.body: Sign in to your integrations provider so your agent can use Gmail, Slack, Google Drive, and 100+ other services on your behalf. We use Composio by default.

authDialog.title: Connecting your integrations provider
authDialog.description: Complete the sign-in in your browser, then return here.
authDialog.waiting: Waiting for you to approve in the browser…

continueAfterConnected: {{toolkits}} connected. Continue the original request now.
continueAfterComposioSignIn: Composio sign-in complete. Continue the original request now.
notVerified: Still not connected. Finish approval in the browser, then verify again.

dispatch.suggestionTitle: I can create {{count}} specialized agents for this
dispatch.tokenNote: Creating agents uses extra tokens but is faster and produces better results.
dispatch.rejectPrompt: No, handle the whole request yourself. Complete it sequentially without creating specialized agents.
dispatch.waitingForAgents: Waiting for the current agents to finish…
dispatch.error: Failed to create agents. Please try again.

saveAgents.title: Save or update these agents?
saveAgents.body: Keep selected agents for later. If one already exists, Houston updates it instead of creating a duplicate.
saveAgents.savedDetail: They are now available in your workspace.
saveAgents.savedConversation: Done. The agents are saved or updated in your workspace. I can help with anything else you need.
saveAgents.error: Failed to save agents. Please try again.
